title: 'Preparations for Punjab Polls Have Begun': AAP Allege Political Motive in ED Raid on Ashok Mittal
description: AAP chief and former Chief Minister of Delhi, Arvind Kejriwal, took to social media on Wednesday (April 15th, 2006), alleging that the raid on Ashok Mittal, party’s new Deputy Leader in the Upper House who replaced Raghav Chadha, is politically motivated.
